description: Fume hood sash raised above the indicated maximum safe operating height
visual_signals: sash above arrow marking on hood frame
fully open fume hood during chemical work
sash height well above 18-inch line

description: Incompatible chemicals stored together such as acids next to bases or oxidizers near flammables
visual_signals: acid bottle adjacent to base bottle on same shelf
oxidizer container beside flammable solvent
mixed color-coded chemical bins in single cabinet

description: Chemical container missing GHS-compliant hazard label or label too degraded to read
visual_signals: unlabeled bottle on bench
container with faded or peeling label
handwritten label lacking GHS pictograms

description: Emergency shower or eyewash station access blocked by equipment, carts, or storage
visual_signals: cart parked in front of eyewash station
boxes stacked under emergency shower pull
equipment obstructing the marked floor clearance zone

description: Personnel performing active lab work without required PPE such as goggles, gloves, or lab coat
visual_signals: person handling chemicals without gloves
researcher at bench with no safety goggles
lab occupant lacking lab coat near open chemicals

description: Sharps disposal container filled above the maximum fill line or overflowing
visual_signals: needles protruding from sharps container opening
container contents visible above fill line
sharps bin with lid unable to close

description: Spill kit missing from designated location, inaccessible behind clutter, or visibly depleted
visual_signals: empty spill kit bucket on wall mount
spill kit buried behind stacked boxes
open spill kit with absorbent pads missing

description: Laboratory exit path blocked by furniture, equipment, or stored materials
visual_signals: equipment cart blocking lab exit door
boxes stacked in doorway path
exit door obstructed by shelving unit

description: Compressed gas cylinder standing unsecured without chain, strap, or wall bracket
visual_signals: free-standing gas cylinder with no restraint
cylinder chain hanging loose and unattached
gas tank leaning against bench without bracket

description: Biosafety cabinet missing current certification tag or tag showing expired date
visual_signals: no certification sticker on BSC exterior
certification tag with date older than one year
BSC with peeling or blank certification label

description: Fume hood face velocity inadequate as shown by smoke tube test failure or indicator strip not deflecting (OSHA 1910.1450)
visual_signals: smoke tube released at hood face drifting away from opening instead of into hood
airflow indicator strip at hood edge hanging limp with no deflection
face velocity sticker showing last test result below 100 fpm

description: Fume hood interior cluttered with excess equipment or chemicals reducing airflow effectiveness
visual_signals: hood interior packed with bottles blocking rear baffle slots
large equipment inside hood restricting cross-sectional airflow
chemical containers stacked high inside hood blocking exhaust slots

description: Flammable storage cabinet doors not self-closing, not grounded, or exceeding capacity (NFPA 45)
visual_signals: yellow flammable cabinet with door propped open by container
flammable cabinet missing grounding wire at bonding lug
flammable cabinet overfilled with bottles visible above shelf lips

description: Flammable storage cabinet missing required Flammable warning signage
visual_signals: yellow cabinet without Flammable Keep Fire Away label
flammable cabinet sign damaged or missing from door
storage cabinet with chemicals but no hazard identification sign

description: Chemical waste containers not labeled, left open when not actively in use, or lacking secondary containment
visual_signals: waste container without hazardous waste label or content description
open chemical waste container on bench with no one actively adding waste
waste container sitting directly on bench without secondary containment tray

description: Chemical waste container missing accumulation start date or exceeding 90-day storage limit
visual_signals: waste container label with no start date written in date field
accumulation date on waste container more than 90 days old
multiple waste containers with dates approaching or past regulatory limit

description: Autoclave door gasket worn, cracked, or showing signs of failure affecting seal integrity
visual_signals: autoclave door gasket with visible cracks or deformation
steam leak visible around autoclave door during cycle
gasket material protruding or displaced from door groove

description: Autoclave biological indicator log not current or operational indicators showing fault
visual_signals: autoclave spore test log with last entry more than one week old
autoclave temperature chart recorder showing incomplete cycle profile
autoclave display panel showing error code or fault indicator

description: Biosafety cabinet face velocity alarm active or airflow visibly inadequate (NSF 49 certification required annually)
visual_signals: BSC alarm light illuminated on front panel indicating airflow failure
BSC sash open beyond safe operating level with no alarm response
smoke or visible aerosol escaping from BSC opening during use

description: Laser safety controls absent including warning signs, interlock doors, and protective eyewear (ANSI Z136)
visual_signals: laser in use without Danger Laser warning sign on lab door
laser lab door without interlock switch and warning light above entry
laser protective eyewear storage rack empty or goggles not visible near laser setup

description: Laser beam path not fully enclosed or stray beam hazard present
visual_signals: open laser beam path without beam tube or enclosure
reflective surface in laser beam path creating potential stray beam
laser aperture aimed toward lab door or window without beam stop

description: Radiation safety controls missing including dosimeter storage, survey meters, and caution signage (NRC 10 CFR 20)
visual_signals: radiation area entry without Caution Radioactive Materials sign
dosimeter storage rack empty or badges not visible at lab entrance
radiation survey meter absent from designated location near source

description: Lead shielding for radioactive sources displaced, damaged, or inadequate
visual_signals: lead brick shielding around source with visible gap or missing brick
lead pig container left open with radioactive source exposed
shielding barrier moved away from source storage location

description: Cryogenic storage Dewars in poor condition or area lacking oxygen depletion monitoring
visual_signals: Dewar flask with heavy frost buildup indicating vacuum failure
cryogenic storage room without oxygen depletion monitor on wall
liquid nitrogen Dewar in small room with no low-oxygen alarm visible

description: Cryogenic storage area lacking adequate ventilation for gas displacement hazard
visual_signals: multiple large Dewars in enclosed room with no ventilation louvers visible
cryogenic freezer in closet-sized space without exhaust fan
LN2 dispensing station without visible ventilation system

description: Electrical safety violation in wet lab including missing GFCI or extension cord use
visual_signals: standard outlet without GFCI near lab sink or wet bench area
extension cord used as permanent power source for lab equipment
electrical cord with cracked insulation or exposed wires near water

description: Chemical segregation storage map not posted near chemical storage areas
visual_signals: chemical storage area wall without visible segregation chart or map
chemical shelving with no color-coded or category-labeled zones
storage room entrance without chemical inventory or compatibility guide

description: PPE storage area contaminated or required protective equipment not available at point of use
visual_signals: safety goggles storage bin empty at lab entrance
face shields and goggles stored on bench next to chemical contamination
lab coat hooks empty with no clean coats available at entry

description: Lab benchtop surface showing cracks, deep stains, or deterioration indicating inadequate decontamination
visual_signals: bench surface with deep cracks allowing chemical absorption
dark chemical staining penetrating benchtop surface material
bench top with peeling or delaminating surface near chemical work area

description: Gas cylinders in lab not properly restrained with regulator, valve cap, or leak detection provisions
visual_signals: gas cylinder connected to regulator but not chained to wall or bench
cylinder without valve protection cap sitting in storage area
gas cylinder without visible leak detection solution or snoop nearby

description: Biohazard signage missing at BSL-rated lab entry or specimen transport containers not sealed
visual_signals: lab entrance without biohazard warning sign or BSL level indicator
specimen transport container with unsealed or cracked lid
biohazard symbol sign missing from door of lab handling infectious agents

description: Biological waste not properly contained in marked biohazard bags or containers
visual_signals: biological waste in regular trash container without biohazard bag
biohazard waste bag overfull and not sealed at top
biohazard waste container without foot-operated lid mechanism

description: Fire extinguisher type not appropriate for laboratory hazards present in area
visual_signals: water-type extinguisher mounted near electrical equipment or solvent storage
no CO2 extinguisher visible near electronics or instrument bench area
single ABC extinguisher as only option near metal hydride or reactive chemical storage

description: Emergency shower not tested weekly or test tag not current (ANSI Z358.1)
visual_signals: emergency shower weekly test tag with no recent date entries
shower pull handle corroded indicating long period without activation
test record clipboard at shower station missing or blank

description: Laboratory chemical hygiene plan not posted or accessible in the lab (OSHA 1910.1450)
visual_signals: chemical hygiene plan binder location empty on designated shelf
no visible CHP reference document near chemical work areas
faded or outdated chemical hygiene plan posted on wall with old revision date

description: Perchloric acid fume hood used without dedicated washdown system or used for incompatible chemicals
visual_signals: perchloric acid work performed in standard fume hood without washdown
perchloric acid hood used for organic solvent work
white crystalline residue visible in hood ductwork from perchloric acid

description: Laboratory refrigerator or freezer used for chemical storage not rated for flammable storage
visual_signals: standard domestic refrigerator in lab storing flammable chemicals
flammable solvents visible in refrigerator without explosion-proof rating label
lab freezer without flammable storage rated sticker containing ether or volatile chemicals
